launch_hw.description: Whether network sockets should be opened or not. If disabled, replay from NebulaPackets messages is enabled automatically.

retry_hw.description: Whether TCP connections are retried on failure or the driver should instead exit.

rotation_speed.description: Motor RPM, the sensor's internal spin rate.

setup_sensor.description: Enable sensor setup on hardware driver.

udp_only.description: Use UDP protocol only (settings synchronization and diagnostics publishing are disabled).
